profile.title: School Profile
profile.subtitle: Get to know SMAN Modal Bangsa.

history.title: School History
history.intro: SMAN Modal Bangsa is a flagship high school of Aceh Province, designed to produce graduates with Islamic character, strong academics, and social awareness.
history.body: Founded with the spirit of nation-building through education, the school combines the national curriculum with leading programs in science, technology, and character formation. For more than a decade, SMAN Modal Bangsa has consistently achieved at regional, national, and international levels.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: To be a school of national and international standard, producing graduates excellent in faith, science, and global perspective.

mission.title: Mission
items: Provide quality education grounded in faith and devotion.
Cultivate strong character, independence, and environmental care.
Build a culture of literacy, research, and innovation.
Expand collaboration with educational institutions at home and abroad.

principal.title: Principal's Welcome
principal.body: Welcome to the official portal of SMAN Modal Bangsa. We are committed to delivering excellent education grounded in faith, knowledge, and good deeds. May this website serve as an effective bridge between school, students, parents, and the community.

facilities.title: School Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Infrastructure that supports the learning process.

items.name: Student Dormitories
items.desc: Comfortable male and female dormitories with 24-hour supervision.

items.name: Science Labs
items.desc: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and Computer labs at national standards.

items.name: Digital Library
items.desc: Print and e-book collections with modern reading spaces.

items.name: School Mosque
items.desc: Center for worship and Islamic learning activities.

items.name: Sports Fields
items.desc: Futsal, basketball, volleyball, and athletics areas.

items.name: Multipurpose Hall
items.desc: Venue for meetings, seminars, and arts performances.
